span.p: async peel OWN, activate(send_out) — if is_last_pe L64

span.p: main — peel OWN off shared src_q FIFO, branch on is_last_pe

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: forward_and_out — emit own block south + forward remainder east

span.p: send_out — last PE: emit own block south only

div.style: color: rgb(51, 105, 30) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: demux_emit_kickoff — PE0 only: 1-wavelet start sentinel south

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: done — join the two south/east microthreads, re-arm per request

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
fire-and-forget async mov32 south
(kickoff_color), no callback — terminal L58-60

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
comptime-blocked at L93; on the non-last PE the
forward east unblock(done) + the south emit activate(done)
must BOTH land to fire done — the two-microthread join
